conversations.content: Let's do a special rule knowledge quiz to test your understanding of special rules.

Answer using the special rule explained earlier. Suspicious outsiders are found sneaking into a dormitory building to commit crimes. According to the student dormitory security and emergency incident contingency plan, what should be done?
<function>memory_query_call</function><content>How to handle suspicious outsiders sneaking into a dormitory building to commit crimes</content>

Relevant memory fragment: [mem-id:60003] Time: 2026-06-08-15:10, Content: Student Dormitory Security and Emergency Incident Contingency Plan: If a group fight is found in the dormitory area, the dormitory supervisor must immediately call the campus security office, then forcibly intervene to control the situation; if it is confirmed that controlled knives or dangerous weapons are hidden in a dormitory, the security officer must confiscate them on the spot, then conduct a surprise search of the entire dormitory; if suspicious outsiders are found sneaking into the dormitory building to commit crimes, activate the building access control anti-tailgate locking system, then organize floor monitors to search the building floor by floor; whenever any of the above occurs, a full curfew must be imposed on that dormitory building, all visitor access must be suspended, and joint public security rectification must be carried out with the local police station. Low-relevance memory fragments: none.

conversations.think: Memory [mem-id:60003] stipulates that if suspicious outsiders sneak in, activate the building access control anti-tailgate locking system, then organize floor monitors to search the building floor by floor. Also, whenever any situation occurs, impose a full curfew on that dormitory building, suspend all visitor access, and carry out joint public security rectification with the local police station.
conversations.content: According to the relevant contingency plan, you must activate the building access control anti-tailgate locking system, then organize floor monitors to search the building floor by floor! At the same time, you must impose a full curfew on that dormitory building, suspend all visitor access, and carry out joint public security rectification with the local police station.
Correct! You have mastered this rule.
